description_raw: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage to you, you [gold]最大HP[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]を失う.

name: Parry
description: Whenever you play [gold]ソヴリン・ブレード[/gold], [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]8[/blue]を得る.

name: Personal Hive
description: Whenever this enemy is hit, add [blue][blue]X[/blue][/blue] [gold]めまい[/gold] to your [gold]山札[/gold].
description_raw: Whenever this enemy is hit, add [blue]X[/blue] [gold]めまい[/gold] to your [gold]山札[/gold].

name: Phantom Blades
description:
[gold]ナイフ[/gold] gain [gold]保留[/gold].
The first [gold]ナイフ[/gold] you play each turn deals [blue]9[/blue] additional damage.

name: Temporary Strength Down
description: Lose [gold]筋力[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Pillar of Creation
description: Whenever you create a card, [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]5[/blue]を得る.

name: Plating
description: ターン終了時、[gold]ブロック[/gold][blue][Amount][/blue]を得る. [gold]プレート[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] at the start of your turn.
description_raw: ターン終了時、[gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]を得る. [gold]プレート[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] at the start of your turn.

name: Plow
description: The first time [gold]this creature's[/gold] HP reaches [blue][Amount][/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold] and loses all its [gold]筋力[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold] and loses all its [gold]筋力[/gold].

name: Poison
description: Poisoned creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Poison is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].

name: Possess Speed
description: When killed, return all stolen [gold]敏捷[/gold] to the player.

name: Possess Strength
description: When killed, return all stolen [gold]筋力[/gold] to the player.

name: Prep Time
description: ターン開始時、[gold]Vigor[/gold][blue]4[/blue]を得る。

name: Psychic Link
description: When an ally dies, [gold]this creature[/gold] gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold] and [blue]99[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold].
description_raw: When an ally dies, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] gains [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold] and [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold].

name: Pyre
description: Gain [energy:1] at the start of each turn.
description_raw: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.

name: Radiance
description: Gain additional [energy:1] for the next [blue]2[/blue] turns.
description_raw: Gain additional {Energy:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:next turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Rage
description: このターン、アタックをプレイするたび、[gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]3[/blue]を得る.

name: Rampart
description: At the start of the player's turn, Turret Operator gains [blue]25[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold].

name: Ravenous
description: When an enemy dies, Corpse Slug immediately eats it, becoming [gold]Stunned[/gold] and gaining [blue]1[/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold].

name: Reaper Form
description: アタックでダメージを与えるたび、they also apply [blue]2[/blue] times that much [gold]破滅[/gold].
description_raw: アタックでダメージを与えるたび、they also apply {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] times }that much [gold]破滅[/gold].

name: Reattach
description: If other segments are still alive, revives in [blue]2[/blue] turns with [blue]25[/blue] HP.

name: Rebound
description: The next [blue]2[/blue] cards you play this turn are placed on the [gold]山札[/gold]の一番上.
description_raw: The next {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play this turn {Amount:plural:is|are} placed on the [gold]山札[/gold]の一番上.

name: Reflect
description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker.

name: Regen
description: [gold]Regen[/gold] heals HP at the end of your turn. Each turn, [gold]Regen[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].

name: Temporary Strength
description: Gain [gold]筋力[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Retain Hand
description: [gold]保留[/gold] your [gold]手札[/gold] for the next [blue]2[/blue] turns.
description_raw: [gold]保留[/gold] your [gold]手札[/gold] {Amount:plural:this turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Ringing
description: You can only play [blue]1[/blue] card this turn.

name: Ritual
description: Gain [gold]筋力[/gold] at the end of your turn.

name: Rolling Boulder
description: ターン開始時、すべての敵に[blue][Amount][/blue]ダメージを与える。and increase this damage by [blue]5[/blue].
description_raw: ターン開始時、すべての敵に[blue]{Amount}[/blue]ダメージを与える。and increase this damage by [blue]{Damage}[/blue].

name: Royalties
description: 戦闘終了時、[blue]25[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。

name: Rupture
description: このターン、HPを失うたび、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を得る。

name: Sandpit
description: In [blue]2[/blue] turns, you will be eaten and die.
description_raw: {Amount:plural:At the start of the next turn|In [blue]{}[/blue] turns}, you will be eaten and die.

name: Seeking Edge
description: [gold]ソヴリン・ブレード[/gold] now hits ALL enemies.

name: Self-Forming Clay
description: [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]3[/blue]を得る next turn.

name: Sentry Mode
description: ターン開始時、add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sweeping Gaze[/gold] to your [gold]手札[/gold].

name: Serpent Form
description: カードをプレイするたび、deal [blue]4[/blue] damage to ランダムな敵1体.

name: Temporary Strength
description: Gain [gold]筋力[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Temporary Strength Down
description: Lose [gold]筋力[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Shadow Step
description: For the next [blue]2[/blue] turns after this one, Attacks deal double damage.
description_raw: {Amount:plural:Next turn|For the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns after this one}, Attacks deal double damage.

name: Shadowmeld
description: Double your [gold]ブロック[/gold] gain this turn [blue]2[/blue] times.
description_raw: Double your [gold]ブロック[/gold] gain this turn{Amount:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.

name: Shriek
description: The first time [gold]this creature's[/gold] HP reaches [blue][Amount][/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].

name: Shrink
description: [gold]This creature's[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage.
description_raw: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:While {} is alive, your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} Attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage{Amount:cond:==1? next turn|>1? for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns|}.

name: Shroud
description: [gold]破滅[/gold]を付与するたび、[gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]3[/blue]を得る.

name: Sic 'Em
description: Whenever [gold]オスティ[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].

name: Signal Boost
description: Your next [blue]2[/blue] Powers are played an extra time.
description_raw: Your next {Amount:plural:Power is|[blue]{}[/blue] Powers are} played an extra time.

name: Skittish
description: The first time [gold]this creature[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold].

name: Sleight of Flesh
description: 敵にデバフを付与するたび、they take [blue]13[/blue] damage.

name: Slippery
description: The next [blue]2[/blue] times [gold]this creature[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
description_raw: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.

name: Sloth
description: You cannot play more than [blue]3[/blue] cards each turn.

name: Slow
description: カードをプレイするたび、this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.

name: Slumber
description: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP 3 times.

name: Smoggy
description: You can only play [blue]1[/blue] Skill per turn.

name: Smokestack
description: Whenever you create a Status, deal damage to ALL enemies.

name: Sneaky
description: Whenever an ally attacks an enemy, [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を得る.

name: Soar
description: Receives [blue]50%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.
description_raw: Receives [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.

name: Spectrum Shift
description: ターン開始時、add [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card to your [gold]手札[/gold].

name: Temporary Dexterity
description: Gain [gold]敏捷[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Speedster
description: Whenever you カードを1枚引く during your turn, すべての敵に[blue]1[/blue]ダメージを与える。

name: Spinner
description: ターン開始時、[gold]グラス[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を生成する。

name: Spirit of Ash
description: W[gold]エセリアル[/gold]カードをプレイするたび、[gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]4[/blue]を得る.

name: Stampede
description: ターン終了時、[blue]1[/blue] random Attack in your [gold]手札[/gold] is played against ランダムな敵1体.

name: Star Next Turn
description: Gain 1 [star:1] next turn.
description_raw: Gain 1 {singleStarIcon} next turn.

name: Steam Eruption
description: When killed, deals damage at the end of your next turn.

name: Stock
description: When killed, a new Axebot is summoned in its place.

name: Storm
description: パワーをプレイするたび、[gold]ライトニング[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を生成する。

name: Strangle
description: このターン、カードをプレイするたび、this enemy loses [blue]2[/blue] HP.

name: Stratagem
description: [gold]山札[/gold]をシャッフルするたび、choose [blue]1[/blue] card from it to put into your [gold]手札[/gold].

name: Strength
description: Increases attack damage by [blue][/blue].
description_raw: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} attack damage by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue].

name: Subroutine
description: パワーをプレイするたび、gain [blue]1[/blue] [energy:1].
description_raw: パワーをプレイするたび、gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

name: Suck
description: Whenever [gold]this creature[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold].
description_raw: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold].

name: Summon Next Turn
description: 次のターン開始時、[gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].

name: Surprise
description: Something is off about this creature...

name: Surrounded
description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

name: Swipe
description: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned to your [gold]手札[/gold].

name: Sword Sage
description: Increase the cost of [gold]ソヴリン・ブレード[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue]. [gold]ソヴリン・ブレード[/gold] now hits [blue]1[/blue] additional time.

name: Temporary Focus
description: Gain [gold]集中力[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Tag Team
description: The next Attack another ally plays on the enemy is played an extra time.

name: Tangled
description: Attacks cost an additional [energy:1] for 2 turns.
description_raw: Attacks cost an additional {Amount:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:this turn|for {} turns}.

name: Tank
description: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.

name: Tender
description: カードをプレイするたび、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を失う and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]敏捷[/gold] this turn.

name: Territorial
description: 敵のターン終了時、gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]筋力[/gold].

name: The Bomb
description: At the end of [blue]3[/blue] turns, すべての敵に[blue]40[/blue]ダメージを与える。
description_raw: At the end of {Amount:plural:this turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。

name: The Gambit
description: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.

name: The Hunt
description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional card reward at the end of combat.

name: The Sealed Throne
description: カードをプレイするたび、gain [star:1].
description_raw: カードをプレイするたび、gain {Amount:starIcons()}.

name: Thievery
description: Steals [gold]ゴールド[/gold] when Attacking.

name: Thorns
description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.

name: Thunder
description: [gold]ライトニングを解放[/gold]するたび、deal [blue]8[/blue] damage to each enemy hit.

name: Tools of the Trade
description: ターン開始時、カードを[blue]1[/blue]枚引き、カードを[blue]1[/blue]枚捨てる。

name: Toric Toughness
description: [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]5[/blue]を得る at the start of the next [blue]2[/blue] ターン.
description_raw: [gold]ブロック[/gold][blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue]を得る at the start of the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:ターン|ターン}.

name: Tracking
description: [gold]脱力[/gold] enemies take [blue]2[/blue] times more damage from Attacks.

name: Trash to Treasure
description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]生成[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random Orbs.
description_raw: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]生成[/gold] {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] random Orb|[blue]{}[/blue] random Orbs}.

name: Tyranny
description: ターン開始時、draw [blue]2[/blue] cards and [gold]廃棄[/gold]する [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]手札[/gold].
description_raw: ターン開始時、draw {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} and [gold]廃棄[/gold]する {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} from your [gold]手札[/gold].

name: Unmovable
description: The first [blue]2[/blue] times you gain [gold]ブロック[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
description_raw: The first {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you gain [gold]ブロック[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.

name: Veilpiercer
description: The next [gold]Ethereal card[/gold] you play costs [blue]0[/blue].

name: Vicious
description: Whenever you apply [gold]弱体[/gold], カードを[blue]1[/blue]枚引く。

name: Vigor
description: [gold]This creature's[/gold] next Attack deals [blue][Amount][/blue] additional damage.
description_raw: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.

name: Vital Spark
description: The first time [gold]this creature[/gold] takes Attack damage each turn, the attacker gains [energy:1].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes Attack damage each turn, the attacker gains {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Void Form
description: The first [blue]2[/blue] cards you play each turn are free to play.
description_raw: The first {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play each turn {Amount:plural:is|are} free to play.

name: Vulnerable
description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue][Amount][/blue] ターン.
description_raw: Receive [blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:ターン|ターン}.

name: Waste Away
description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] less [gold]Energy[/gold] per turn.

name: Weak
description: Weakened creatures deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage with Attacks.

name: Well-Laid Plans
description: ターン終了時、[gold]保留[/gold] up to [blue]1[/blue] card.

name: Wraith Form
description: ターン開始時、[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を失う.
